name: Buried Vault
description: The vault hums with dead cooling lines and the kind of silence that only exists where records were buried on purpose.
detail: Dustless terminal glass and locked index drawers suggest somebody still curates this place, even if nobody admits it upstairs.

fixtures.name: dead terminal
fixtures.inspect: The dead terminal still throws a faint phosphor ghost if you stare long enough at the blank glass.

fixtures.name: index drawers
fixtures.inspect: The drawers are numbered in a sequence that skips the integers most likely to contain scandal.

mood: The cooling lines are silent in the way only places that were quiet on purpose can be.
Tonight one of the index drawers is one centimetre further open than the seal will admit.
There is a dust pattern on the floor that suggests somebody walked here, paused, and walked back.

scavenge.note: You search the vault under the suspicion that even the dust here would rather be classified.
scavenge.message: A cracked index drawer yields a black shard and old money that still smells like institutional panic.
